name: sub-agent-workshop
description: Plan and run bounded sub-agent workstreams with personality, direction, separate chat windows, and an up-front fit check.

interface.shortDescription: Break suitable projects into independent sub-agent chat lanes.
interface.longDescription: Sub-Agent Workshop helps a lead agent decide whether a project can be cleanly split, define each sub-agent's personality and direction, open separate work lanes, and keep coupled or final-alignment-heavy work with a single agent.
defaultPrompt: Break this project into independent sub-agent lanes and open chat windows only if it fits.
Create a sub-agent roster with personality, direction, ownership, and handoff expectations.
Decide which parts should stay with a single lead agent because they require final alignment.
